title: ExecutionStatusEventPayload
description: Payload for execution_status_event family v1. Truthful execution status snapshot emitted by FA Local, transported through the proving-slice pipeline for operator visibility.

request_id.description: UUID of the original FA Local execution request.

correlation_id.description: Lineage correlation UUID spanning the full execution chain.

current_posture.description: Resolved FA Local approval posture. Remains distinct from execution state.

execution_plan_id.description: UUID of the bounded execution plan. Null before plan is admitted.

stable_plan_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the stable execution plan. Null before plan is admitted.

degraded_subtype.description: Degraded subtype when state is degraded, partial_success, or completed_with_constraints. Null otherwise.

updated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of this status event.

started_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when execution started. Null before execution begins.

completed_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when execution completed. Null while in progress.

current_step.description: Current declared step ID while in_progress. Null at all other states.

completion_summary.description: Plain-language completion summary. Present on completed or completed_with_constraints.

failure_summary.description: Plain-language failure summary. Present on failed state.

truthful_operator_summary.description: Always-present truthful plain-language summary for the operator review surface.
